_meta.method: Crawled zen-azi.org node IDs via Google site-search and the working /en/recherche-lieux-meditation page; harvested ABZE teacher list, Bouddha.ch France directory, Bouddhisme-France UBF annuaire (zen subset), and the official Plum Village 'Liste des sanghas francophones' PDF (April 2024). All entries are FR-only and do NOT duplicate names/cities already present in zen-places-fr.json.
_meta.coverageEstimate: ~75 new entries closes roughly 60-70% of the previously identified gap. AZI smaller groupes (Aubagne, Tarbes, Foix, Castelnaudary, Quimper, Lorient, Saint-Brieuc, Caen, Bourges, Rabastens, Nevers, Bayonne, Bordeaux 2nd, etc.) are now covered, plus the major Plum Village/Sanghas francophones network across most departments.
knownGaps: AZI 'correspondants' (single-person contact points) outside the searched cities — many small towns still missing.
Sanbō Zen private zazenkais (only Bruce Harris's main residence is enumerated).
Tibetan-Zen syncretic groups and one-person hermitages without a web presence.
Independent Rinzai sittings (besides Falaise Verte) — Hakuun-an, Daishin Zen, Frédéric Mendelssohn-Bartholdy circles.
